chapter_title.en: Chapter 18 – Distribution of the war booty

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/382)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/382)
text: إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) خَرَجَ بِالنِّسَاءِ فِي الْحَرْبِ حَتَّى يُدَاوِينَ الْجَرْحَى وَ لَمْ يَقْسِمْ لَهُنَّ مِنَ الْفَيْ‏ءِ شَيْئاً وَ لَكِنَّهُ نَفَّلَهُنَّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Yahya, form Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, altogether from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5<sup>th</sup> or 6<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said that Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> went out with the women during the war until they would treat the wounded, and did not distribute for them anything from the war booty, but gifted it voluntarily for them’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from and Muhammad ibn Yahya from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn all from ‘Uthman from ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘ah from one of the two Imams, recipients of divine supreme covenant, who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah took part in war in company of women so that they could nurse the wounded. He did not give them a share of the captured properties but he did so in an optional manner.”
